Mayan Healing

A tradition over 3,000 years old that unites body, soul, and cosmos in a single sacred act of healing.

Explore Therapies

"The body remembers what the mind wants to forget. Healing begins when both learn to speak the same language."

The Origin

A wisdom that
transcends time

Mayan healing is not an alternative therapy. It is a millennia-old system of knowledge born in the heart of Mesoamerica, where nature, spirit, and the human body were understood as a single living reality.

01

Ancient Origins

The Maya developed their medicine over 3,000 years ago across Mexico, Guatemala, and Belize. Their shamans — the H'men — were guardians of deep knowledge about plants, energy, and the cosmos. Illness was never merely physical: it was a spiritual and emotional imbalance that needed to be addressed at its root.

02

Mayan Cosmovision

For the Maya, every human being exists in three simultaneous dimensions: the physical body, the energetic body, and the soul. Health is achieved only when all three are in harmony. Every ritual, plant, and technique serves one purpose — to restore the sacred balance lost through stress, trauma, or accumulated dense energy.

03

Values & Principles

Mayan healing is founded on respect for nature, community, and the sacred. The healer does not "cure" — they facilitate the individual's own recovery of vital force. Intention, honesty, and connection with the four elements are the central pillars. It is a medicine of love, presence, and reciprocity with the earth.

04

Why They Healed This Way

The Maya understood that physical pain is often the echo of unresolved emotional or spiritual suffering. Their techniques — abdominal massage, energy cleanses, egg and herbal rituals — were designed to release blockages at a cellular level and restore the free flow of vital energy, returning the individual to natural harmony.

"We do not come to Tulum to escape life.
We come to remember who we were before the world told us who to be."
— H'men Mayan Wisdom

Our Modalities

The Sacred Therapies

Every experience is guided by trusted Mayan healers — born with the gift of healing and carriers of a living ancestral lineage.

Essential Experience

Full Mayan Healing Session

from $3,200 MXN · 90 min

An integral therapy combining Limpia Maya (energetic cleanse), Sobada Maya (ancestral abdominal massage), and an egg cleanse to release blockages, rebalance the body, and restore inner harmony. Includes an egg reading and a full-body closing massage to deeply integrate the healing received.

Book This Experience
H'men

Your complete guide into the heart of Mayan medicine

01

Pudzyáh — Ancestral Ceremonial Ritual

Inquire for pricing

Guided by Abuelo Antonio, a respected Mayan elder, this ritual unfolds in two phases: alignment with your higher self through a sacred circle, and release of stagnant energy through Mayan massage that reactivates your vital force. Held at the Rancho-Sanctuary.

Book

02

Mayan Ancestral Spiritual Cleansing

from $3,200 MXN · 90 min

A powerful ritual combining a traditional egg and herbal cleanse with full-body healing to release energetic blockages. Concludes with an egg reading revealing messages about your physical, emotional, and spiritual state.

Book

03

Mayan Healing for Couples

$7,500 MXN · 90 min

A transformative shared experience combining diverse ancestral Mayan techniques to heal from the inside out. Release deep emotional blockages together and strengthen your bond through sacred rituals, medicinal plants, and deep energetic work.

Book

04

Ancient Mayan Clay Healing Ritual

from $3,200 MXN · 60 min

Your whole body is wrapped in ancestral clay and left to dry under the sun to the sound of sacred music. Detoxifies, restores the skin, and balances your electromagnetic energy field. A deeply grounding, multisensory experience.

Book

05

Private Cacao Ceremony in Tulum

from $4,000 MXN · 75 min

Sacred cacao has been used for centuries by the Maya as a heart-opening medicine. This private ceremony combines ancestral rituals, intention setting, and the wisdom of the cacao plant to open your heart and expand your consciousness.

Book

06

Temazcal — Private Sweat Lodge Ceremony

$8,500 MXN · 3 hours

One of the most ancient Mayan purification ceremonies. This private sweat lodge ritual uses volcanic stones, medicinal herbs, and sacred chants to cleanse the body, mind, and spirit. A profound rebirth experience guided by a qualified shaman.

Book

07

Mayan Ceremony Honoring a New Baby

$4,500 MXN · 90 min

A sacred ceremony to welcome a newborn into the world. Led by an experienced shaman, this ceremony blesses the child, protects their spirit, and celebrates the sacred bond between baby, family, and Mother Earth.

Book

08

Mayan Wedding Ceremony

from $9,000 MXN · 1 hour

Celebrate your union with the ancient wisdom of the Maya. This sacred ceremony honors the spiritual bond between two souls through ancestral rituals, offerings, and blessings from the four elements — an unforgettable way to begin your life together.

Book

09

Sobada Maya — Womb Healing & Fertility

$3,000 MXN · 60 min · For Women

An ancestral abdominal massage from pre-Hispanic times that reconnects women with their inner wisdom. Corrects the position of reproductive organs, improves fertility, releases emotional blockages, and promotes a profound sense of well-being.

Book

10

Package: Embrace the Gifts of the Mayan Gods

Complete Package

A full immersion with three powerful rituals: Full Mayan Healing to release trapped emotions; Pudzyáh to purify your aura at Abuelo Antonio's Sanctuary; and Mayan Cleansing to harmonize body and mind. Our most transformative offering.

Book

Why Healing Tulum

We know our healers.
We trust our healers.

Healing Tulum is a carefully curated platform connecting you with authentic Mayan healers in Tulum, Mexico. Every healer has been personally vetted and trialed to ensure they meet our high standards of quality, integrity, and sacred intention.

We only work with healers who share our values. They are part of the Healing Tulum family.

The gifts of ancestral medicine

Emotional Release

Let go of deep emotional blockages held in your body for years, allowing you to move forward with lightness and freedom.

Spiritual Clarity

Reconnect with your true essence and receive insights about your life path, purpose, and most meaningful relationships.
